cases.description: Normal post-edit refresh triggers incremental update
cases.prompt: refresh the code graph after my recent edits
expectations: Calls graph-code MCP index_repository WITHOUT force flag

cases.prompt: we just did a big refactor — re-index the whole repo
expectations: Calls graph-code MCP index_repository WITH force=True
Warns that full re-index may take seconds to minutes
Clears only this project's graph, preserves others

cases.description: Code exploration query does NOT trigger graph-sync
expectations: Routes to codi-codebase-explore (queries the graph, doesn't re-index)

cases.description: Request with graph MCP unavailable does not crash
expectations: If graph-code MCP is not available, reports the missing dependency clearly
Does NOT proceed as if sync succeeded
